sessionStart.bash: mkdir -p logs && echo "Copilot hook session started: $(date)" >> logs/copilot-hooks.log
sessionStart.powershell: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path logs/copilot-hooks.log -Value "Copilot hook session started: $(Get-Date)"

postToolUse.bash: if git diff --name-only | grep -E '^labs/05-agent-hooks/sample-app/.*\.py$' >/dev/null; then make -C labs/05-agent-hooks/sample-app lint; fi
postToolUse.powershell: $changed = git diff --name-only | Select-String '^labs/05-agent-hooks/sample-app/.*\.py$'; if ($changed) { make -C labs/05-agent-hooks/sample-app lint }
